exercises.code:
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-040-1A", **{"source": "ops", "stimulus": "100 req/s", "environment": "peak", "response": "serve", "observed_ms": 280, "target_ms": 300, "owner": "platform"}}
predicate_ok = not (record["observed_ms"] >= record["target_ms"])
meets_contract = bool(predicate_ok)
status = ("PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_QA_SCENARIO")
print("S40-T1-A", status)

selfcheck.chosen_text: escenario QA completo con umbral y dueño
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: contrasté opciones del selfCheck del quiz_card S40 con párrafos de theory. Pregunta: ¿Qué evidencia permite aprobar `requisitos funcionales y quality attributes` en CASO-LIM-040?.
